OSHINOGO-SHINE_POWER.title: Shine
OSHINOGO-SHINE_POWER.description: Effective on cards with Shine. Increase by a value equal to Shine.
OSHINOGO-TURN_SHINE_POWER.title: Round To Shine
OSHINOGO-TURN_SHINE_POWER.description: The Shine that takes effect this round will be removed at the end of the round.
OSHINOGO-TEMP_SHINE_POWER.title: Temporary Shine
OSHINOGO-TEMP_SHINE_POWER.description: Remove after playing a card with Shine.
OSHINOGO-REVENGE_POWER.title: Revenge
OSHINOGO-REVENGE_POWER.description: Effective on cards with Shine. Multiply the card value according to Revenge; when playing a shining card, you will lose life equal to Revenge.
OSHINOGO-TURN_REVENGE_POWER.title: Round Of Revenge
OSHINOGO-TURN_REVENGE_POWER.description: Revenge that takes effect this round will be removed at the end of the round.
OSHINOGO-TEMP_REVENGE_POWER.title: Temporary Revenge
OSHINOGO-TEMP_REVENGE_POWER.description: Remove after playing a card with Shine.
OSHINOGO-REVENGE_REFUND_POWER.title: Revenge Return
OSHINOGO-SHINE_REFUND_POWER.title: Shining Return
OSHINOGO-GAIN_TEMP_SHINE_NEXT_TURN_POWER: Gain [gold] temporary Shine[/gold] at the beginning of the next turn.
Gain {Amount} points[gold]temporary Shine[/gold] at the beginning of the next turn.
OSHINOGO-GAIN_TURN_SHINE_NEXT_TURN_POWER: Gain [gold] turn Shine[/gold] at the beginning of the next turn.
At the beginning of the next turn, gain {Amount} points[gold] and Shine [/gold].
OSHINOGO-GAIN_TEMP_REVENGE_NEXT_TURN_POW: Gain [gold]temporary Revenge[/gold] at the beginning of the next turn.
Gain {Amount} points[gold]temporary Revenge[/gold] at the beginning of the next turn.
OSHINOGO-GAIN_TURN_REVENGE_NEXT_TURN_POW: Get [gold]Revenge[/gold] at the beginning of the next turn.
At the beginning of the next round, gain {Amount} points[gold]Revenge of the turn[/gold].
OSHINOGO-VENGEANCE_BELL_POWER.title: Revenge Bell (Echo)
OSHINOGO-VENGEANCE_BELL_POWER.descriptio: At the beginning of the next round, all enemies lose 10 life points.
OSHINOGO-ACT_CUTE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.title: Be Cute (prepared)
OSHINOGO-ACT_CUTE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.descri: At the beginning of the next round, it will be incorporeal and unable to play cards, and its life will be restored at the end of the round.
OSHINOGO-ACT_CUTE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.smarte: At the beginning of the next round, it will be incorporeal and unable to play cards. At the end of the round, {Amount} points of life will be restored.
OSHINOGO-ACT_CUTE_LOCKOUT_POWER.title: Acting Cute
OSHINOGO-ACT_CUTE_LOCKOUT_POWER.descript: Unable to play cards. Life is restored at the end of the turn.
OSHINOGO-ACT_CUTE_LOCKOUT_POWER.smarterD: Unable to play cards. At the end of the round, restore {Amount} points of life.
OSHINOGO-MIRROR_STAGE_POWER.title: Mirror Stage
OSHINOGO-MIRROR_STAGE_POWER.description: Reflect all blocked damage this round.
OSHINOGO-MOTHERS_LIE_POWER.title: Mother's Lies
OSHINOGO-MOTHERS_LIE_POWER.description: Every time you lose life this round, all enemies will lose life.
OSHINOGO-MOTHERS_LIE_POWER.smarterDescri: Each time you lose life this round, all enemies will lose {Amount} points of life.
OSHINOGO-NEXT_SHINE_DISCOUNT_POWER.title: Rhythm Adjustment
OSHINOGO-CHASING_LIGHT_POWER.title: Chasing The Light
OSHINOGO-CHASING_LIGHT_POWER.description: Every time a certain amount of [gold] is used to Shine [/gold], 1 point of energy is obtained.
OSHINOGO-CHASING_LIGHT_POWER.smarterDesc: For every {Amount} point [gold] Shines [/gold] used, 1 energy point is obtained.
OSHINOGO-FLEEING_LIGHT_POWER.title: Fleeing From Light
OSHINOGO-FLEEING_LIGHT_POWER.description: Every time a certain amount of [gold]Revenge[/gold] is used, 1 card is drawn.
OSHINOGO-FLEEING_LIGHT_POWER.smarterDesc: For every {Amount} point[gold]Revenge[/gold] used, draw 1 card.
OSHINOGO-LAST_MINUTE_STUDY_POWER.title: Final Review
OSHINOGO-LAST_MINUTE_STUDY_POWER.descrip: Gain 1 point [gold] temporary Shine[/gold] when playing a skill card.
OSHINOGO-STAY_INDOORS_POWER.title: Stay Behind Closed Doors
OSHINOGO-STAY_INDOORS_POWER.description: At the end of the round, if you lost life this round, you will gain 2 [gold] Temporary Revenge [/gold] and 5 [gold] Block [/gold] points in the next round.
OSHINOGO-RUMOR_NETWORK_POWER.title: Rumor Network
OSHINOGO-RUMOR_NETWORK_POWER.description: When giving [gold] Weak[/gold] or [gold] Vulnerable[/gold] for the first time each round, draw a card.
OSHINOGO-RUMOR_NETWORK_POWER.smarterDesc: When giving [gold] Weak[/gold] or [gold] Vulnerable[/gold] for the first time each round, draw {Amount} cards.
OSHINOGO-STAGE_ARMOR_POWER.title: Stage Shell
OSHINOGO-STAGE_ARMOR_POWER.description: For every 1 life point lost, gain [gold]Block[/gold].
OSHINOGO-STAGE_ARMOR_POWER.smarterDescri: For every life point lost, gain {Amount} points[gold]Block[/gold].
OSHINOGO-DIE_ALONE_POWER.title: Die Alone
OSHINOGO-DIE_ALONE_POWER.description: When losing life for the first time in each round, gain 3 points of [gold] to block [/gold].
OSHINOGO-RUBY_LEGACY_POWER.title: Ruby's Legacy
OSHINOGO-RUBY_LEGACY_POWER.description: When you get [gold] Shine[/gold], get 3 points of [gold] block[/gold]. When gaining [gold]Revenge[/gold], lose 1 life and gain 8 [gold]Block[/gold].
OSHINOGO-DUAL_MIRROR_POWER.title: Double-sided Mirror
OSHINOGO-DUAL_MIRROR_POWER.description: Whenever [gold] Shine[/gold] or [gold]Revenge[/gold] changes, draw 1 card.
OSHINOGO-SHELL_FORGED_BY_LIES_POWER.desc: At the end of the round, cause [gold]Revenge[/gold]×4 damage to all enemies. If you have lost life this round, damage +8.
OSHINOGO-LIGHT_FROM_PASSION_POWER.title: The Light Of Passion
OSHINOGO-LIGHT_FROM_PASSION_POWER.descri: At the end of the turn, gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to [gold]Shine[/gold]×6.
OSHINOGO-RETREAT_BACKSTAGE_POWER.title: Escape Behind The Scenes
OSHINOGO-RETREAT_BACKSTAGE_POWER.descrip: The first time you get [gold]Revenge[/gold] each round, you gain 2 energy points and 10 [gold] block [/gold] points.
OSHINOGO-TAKE_THE_STAGE_POWER.title: Get On Stage
OSHINOGO-TAKE_THE_STAGE_POWER.descriptio: When you get [gold] Shine[/gold] for the first time each round, draw 2 cards and gain 6 points of [gold]Block[/gold].
OSHINOGO-IDOL_RADIANCE_POWER.title: Idol Light
OSHINOGO-IDOL_RADIANCE_POWER.description: When you play the [gold]Shine[/gold] card for the first time in each round, you will get 2 point of [gold]Temporary Shine[/gold].
OSHINOGO-REVEAL_TRUTH_POWER.title: Reveal The Truth
OSHINOGO-REVEAL_TRUTH_POWER.description: At the beginning of the round, if your health is less than half, gain 1 point of [gold]Revenge[/gold].
OSHINOGO-TRAP_POWER.title: Trap
OSHINOGO-TRAP_POWER.description: Attack damage taken is increased by 100%. Decreased by 1 layer at the end of each round.
OSHINOGO-ESCAPE_POWER.title: Get Away
OSHINOGO-ESCAPE_POWER.description: Attack damage taken is reduced by 50%. Decreased by 1 layer at the end of each round.
OSHINOGO-RUMOR_POWER.title: Gossip
OSHINOGO-RUMOR_POWER.description: Each layer increases attack damage received by 10%. Decreased by 1 layer at the end of each round.
OSHINOGO-PLAN_POWER.title: Plan
OSHINOGO-PLAN_POWER.description: Used to play specific cards or change card effects.
OSHINOGO-BLACK_STAR_POWER.title: Dark Stars
OSHINOGO-BLACK_STAR_POWER.description: Each time you obtain a plan, you gain 1 additional layer.
OSHINOGO-SINKING_POWER.title: Sink
OSHINOGO-SINKING_POWER.description: Gain a plan at the beginning of each round.
OSHINOGO-SINKING_POWER.smarterDescriptio: Gain {Amount} level of planning at the beginning of each round.
OSHINOGO-UNREACHABLE_POWER.title: Out Of Reach
OSHINOGO-UNREACHABLE_POWER.description: For every 7 cards drawn, 1 additional card is drawn.
OSHINOGO-ENCORE_POWER.title: Encore
OSHINOGO-ENCORE_POWER.description: Each time you obtain a blood-soaked petal, gain 2 [gold] block [/gold] points.
OSHINOGO-NIGHTMARE_POWER.title: Nightmare
OSHINOGO-NIGHTMARE_POWER.description: Whenever a card is consumed, gain 2 points of temporary Revenge.
OSHINOGO-BEAUTIFUL_DREAM_POWER.title: Sweet Dream
OSHINOGO-BEAUTIFUL_DREAM_POWER.descripti: Each time a card is generated during battle, you will gain temporary Shine.
OSHINOGO-BEAUTIFUL_DREAM_POWER.smarterDe: Each time a card is generated during battle, you will gain {Amount} points of temporary Shine.
OSHINOGO-TWO_CHILDS_POWER.title: Two Kids?
OSHINOGO-TWO_CHILDS_POWER.description: Gain 2 points of temporary Shine and 2 points of temporary Revenge each round.
OSHINOGO-HANDSCROLL_PAINTING_POWER.title: Picture Scroll
OSHINOGO-HANDSCROLL_PAINTING_POWER.descr: After winning the battle, 1 card can be permanently removed from the deck.
OSHINOGO-FIRE_EXECUTION_POWER.title: Burning At The Stake
OSHINOGO-FIRE_EXECUTION_POWER.descriptio: Each time you deal unblocked damage to an enemy, grant 1 stack of Rumor.
OSHINOGO-METAMORPHOSIS_POWER.title: Metamorphosis
OSHINOGO-METAMORPHOSIS_POWER.description: No longer affected by weakness, vulnerability, or vulnerability.
OSHINOGO-THEREBY_SHINING_POWER.title: Thus Shine
OSHINOGO-THEREBY_SHINING_POWER.descripti: Each time a void card is played, gain 1 energy point.
OSHINOGO-EXPECT_POWER.title: Expect
OSHINOGO-EXPECT_POWER.description: During this round, the expendable cards played will go into the discard pile.
OSHINOGO-BACK_VIEW_POWER.title: Back View
OSHINOGO-BACK_VIEW_POWER.description: The next consumed card played is returned to the hand.
OSHINOGO-FARAWAY_POWER.title: Keep Away
OSHINOGO-FARAWAY_POWER.description: At the beginning of the next turn, damage is dealt to all enemies.
OSHINOGO-FARAWAY_POWER.smarterDescriptio: At the beginning of the next turn, deal {Amount} points of damage to all enemies.
OSHINOGO-DESOLATE_BATTLEFIELD_POWER.desc: Power is temporarily lost this round and returned at the end of the round.
OSHINOGO-UNDER_THE_SEA_POWER.title: Fall Into The Sea
OSHINOGO-UNDER_THE_SEA_POWER.description: Die at the beginning of the next turn.
OSHINOGO-ENCORE_POWER.smarterDescription: Each time you obtain a blood-soaked petal, gain {Amount} points in block.
OSHINOGO-TROUBLE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.title: Trouble
OSHINOGO-TROUBLE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.descrip: Get blood-soaked petals starting next round
